entries.definition:
q–ṭ–ṭ to snip, to clip, to rip; edge of a cliff, rim of a hoof; to
abate; enough, share, lot; written record; cat; drizzle. Of this root,
قِطّ qiṭṭ occurs once in the Qur’an.

قِطّ qiṭṭ [n.] share; written record (38:16) وَقَالُوا رَبَّنَا عَجِّلْ لَنَا
قِطَّنَا قَبْلَ يَوْمِ الْحِسَابِ and they say, ‘Our Lord, advance us our share [of
punishment] before the Day of Reckoning!’
